description: The campus security office handed the IT desk three pieces of equipment that were left in various campus locations over the weekend. The asset tags have been worn off or removed, so you only have the physical Serial Numbers. You need to secure these assets in Snipe-IT. Create a new Location named 'Security Holding' and a new Status Label named 'Recovered - Holding' with the type 'Undeployable' and color #FF9800. For the devices with serial numbers 'SNDELL-992211', 'SNAPPLE-445566', and 'SNPOLY-778899', check them in (if currently checked out) with the note 'Recovered by Campus Security', then update their Status to 'Recovered - Holding' and their Default Location to 'Security Holding'.
